content:
Hi Stefan

You're welcome to add any improvement ideas you have on Mozilla connect where the community can vote on them. Those with high vote counts have a greater chance of being priorities for development,

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/idb-p/ideas/label-name/thunderbird%20android

Extending the Unified inbox feature to include Unified sent, spam, draft & trash folders is on the roadmap. You can show support by up-voting the idea below on Mozilla connect.

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/thunderbird-mobile-unified-folder-for-inbox-drafts-sent-spam/idi-p/95546
creator: platform34

content: A bug report is open to investigate the same point you raise and marked as a regression. https://github.com/thunderbird/thunderbird-android/issues/10889
creator: platform34

content:
I’ve seen this issue before where enabling “Move as a Visible Message Action” doesn’t actually make the option appear as expected. In many cases, it’s related to permission settings or how the forum roles are configured. You might want to double-check whether your account or moderator role has the correct privileges enabled.

Also, sometimes changes like this require clearing cache or logging out and back in before they fully apply. If the problem still continues, reviewing recent updates or known issues in the forum software could help.

I came across a similar discussion that explains this in more detail, which might be useful: https://vehiculoss.com
creator: seoguru262

content: I'd suggest raising this as a bug report on github. https://github.com/thunderbird/thunderbird-android/issues
